title: Flipbook
excerpt: While gathered at CHA, we thought it would be fun for crafters and creatives to get a little artsy. To help celebrate the launch of Sketchbook , some of the folks who stopped by our booth took time to play…
body:
While gathered at CHA, we thought it would be fun for crafters and creatives to get a little artsy. To help celebrate the launch of Sketchbook, some of the folks who stopped by our booth took time to play with watercolors, mists, chalk inks and markers.

Each page was done by a different person, then photographed and stitched together into this fun video. Take a look:

If you're interested in winning a selection of Sketchbook products worth $50, check out this American Crafts blog post. I just adore how this came together - thanks to everyone who participated and shared your talents. Hope you all enjoy the mini masterpieces!

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
